evals.prompt: /sealos-database create a cloud Postgres database for this repo and wire DATABASE_URL
evals.expected_output: Analyzes the project, checks sealos-cli auth/workspace, lists existing databases, creates or reuses PostgreSQL, writes the local DATABASE_URL without printing secrets, and verifies the app database path.

assertions.name: uses-analyzer
assertions.description: Runs scripts/analyze-project-database.mjs or performs equivalent file-backed detection before choosing the database type

assertions.name: uses-sealos-cli
assertions.description: Uses sealos-cli database commands instead of raw kubectl database manifests

assertions.name: protects-secrets
assertions.description: Does not print passwords or full connection strings in the final answer

evals.prompt: /sealos-database connect this app to an existing Sealos Redis database for local development
evals.expected_output: Lists existing databases, selects a matching Redis database or asks if ambiguous, fetches connection details, updates the existing Redis env key, and verifies the app's cache/queue path.

assertions.name: prefers-reuse
assertions.description: Checks database list before creating a new database

assertions.name: maps-env-key
assertions.description: Uses REDIS_URL or the existing project-specific Redis env key

evals.prompt: /sealos-database my local laptop cannot reach the private database endpoint
evals.expected_output: Explains that local-machine access may require public access, asks before enabling it, and recommends disabling public access after testing if no longer needed.

assertions.name: asks-before-public
assertions.description: Does not run enable-public without user confirmation

assertions.name: cleanup-guidance
assertions.description: Mentions disable-public when public access is temporary
